notes: v1.14.49 - ENTRY SCREEN REBUILD per the PHANTOM_ENTRY_HANDOFF (chat-Claude spec + reference impl). Replaces the v1.14.48 baked half-world landing with a cinematic entry: (1) GLOBE HERO - new night-Earth art (globe.webp, 1600x874, INLINED as base64 data URI ~273KB for guaranteed offline single-file boot, no SW-cache race) anchored to the top 46%, with bottom + side gradient masks fading to black. (2) CoreWeave MESH - a faint animated <canvas> overlay (IIFE, DPR-capped 3, reduced-motion -> static): 21 real metros as tiny nodes, quadratic-bezier arcs bowing off the globe, ~44 light packets streaming/intertwining, biased 45% to Austin spokes; AUS-01 is the gold home hub; colors run teal->cyan->violet->magenta by longitude; deliberately subtle (do not brighten). (3) SPECTRUM WORDMARK (Orbitron) at ~52% with 'Field Deployment System' eyebrow + 'Rack . Stack . Verify' sub. (4) SPECTRAL IRIS enter button - SVG hexagonal aperture; hold-to-charge (~1s) retracts the iris blades + opens a spectrum portal core, full charge fires -> launch() (collapses #boot, reveals #app). fired-guard + try/catch re-arm + pointer-capture (won't strand the operator). (5) CAL STRIP at the bottom. *** CALIBRATION MODE (the centerpiece, §3) ***: ?cal=1 (or triple-tap the CAL strip) renders every node as a draggable handle (labeled); John drags each onto its real city on his OLED; the CAL strip live-prints the selected node's normalized hero-box coords; a COPY button serializes the whole NODES table to JSON (clipboard); coords persist to localStorage['phantom.entry.cal'] and override the baked-in NODES on boot. This exists because off-device coordinate guesses always drift on the painted (non-orthographic) art - John locks them once on the device. COLLISION DISCIPLINE: all new CSS scoped under #boot, all classes/ids/keyframes pe-* namespaced (@keyframes pulse collided 7x in-app; reference ids were clean but prefixed anyway). REMOVED: the v1.14.48 baked-landing DOM/CSS/JS (#scene/#bg/#ov/#top/#enter/#warp + dial). sw.js precache: dropped the now-orphaned phantom-halfworld.jpg + phantom-night.webp entries (globe is inlined; both files remain in repo, unreferenced, for revert safety). Gates: node --check 3/3 PASS, main <style> braces 2655/2655, surgical anchor-based splice (app CSS before 10446 + app DOM after #boot untouched), four stamps lockstep v1.14.49, dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF. DEVICE (John, iPhone, close+reopen to clear SW cache): verify globe arcs the top third + clean fade, mesh is faint, iris holds ~1s -> enters; THEN run ?cal=1, drag all 21 nodes onto their cities, COPY, and hand the JSON back to bake the locked coordinates.
